title: O123456789f
description: Changes the type of item numbers. 1.20.1 Forge
body:
_This mod is made to order_
> ![Привет](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df7ba84d5a50faa9cff393059576ac220cf6965f.png)

Changes the display of the font of the number
(Меняет отображение шрифта цифр)

![печь](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/450a63a1bbd2237219cf02f7c5fc4756d4aaa6eb.png)

![Z](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33be0fce4c294493bd0efe4cd1ab399abce375d.png)

**We can arrange to order a mod at Discord, my nickname is Gvoper**


**По заказу модов можно связаться со мной в Discord или телеграм: Gvoper**
